counters.description: quite painful early game, can save adc sometimes when hooked but late game hook = dead
need to position away from adc or you wont be able to peel
you out roam senna but she will free scale vs you.
his ult ignores shields keep that in mind. use q to interrupt his q.

synergies.description: very good peel for draven, can get kills with hitting nados in lane, and can play to 2v3 in alot of scenarios.
keeping aphelios alive is main objective and giving him ad with e will just let him kill everything.
good poke lane, and very easy to leave ezreal to 1v2 and win the map
good at clearing waves. if u have ziggs just let him lane bot alone and roam.
janna yasuo is very strong, knockup for his ult, ad scales well with him and you can keep him alive very easily.
jhin scales very well with ad so your e is very good for him. jhin is also very good at farming 1v2 just not as good as ezreal.
kalista wants engage to really shine.
kaisa has very little synergy, she benefits off cc which you dont have much of. she likes to dive back line where you cant peel her.
hypercarry to fight front to back fights with.
hypercarry to fight front to back fights with.
will struggle to lane with vayne. she also is hard to peel if she doesnt play teamfights with you.
cait janna very strong, will push and have prio alot. make sure to ward deep so you arent ganked.
